title: Senior Videographer & Video Editor
description_html:
We are seeking a talented Senior Videographer & Video Editor to join our Video Production Team. In this role, you will be instrumental in crafting compelling, high-quality video content that transforms ideas into engaging visual stories across digital platforms.

You will assist in the end-to-end production process, from conceptualizing and filming to editing and final delivery. A strong storytelling instinct, sharp visual sense, and dedication to creative excellence are essential. You will take ownership of shoots, manage lighting and camera setups, direct on-site talent when needed, and ensure every frame aligns with brand and creative standards.

Beyond technical expertise, you will also mentor junior team members, share best practices, and help maintain smooth, efficient production workflows. Strong proficiency in camera operation, lighting techniques, post-production editing, and collaborative teamwork is key to succeeding in this position.

If you are passionate about producing impactful visual content and have a portfolio that reflects both creativity and technical mastery, we would love to hear from you.
responsibilities: Able to direct shoots and provide creative direction.
Able to assist in coordinating the production team.
Trim footage segments and combine the sequences of the film.
Develop and execute overall video brand messaging strategy.
Prepare rough and final cuts for the videos.
Input effects, graphics, dialogues, and music into videos to enhance visual appeal.
Insert music and necessary sound effects to the video clips.
Monitor all technical aspects of recording and editing to ensure quality standards.
Discover and implement new videography/video editing techniques and methods to maximize the company’s efficiency.
Work both on-site and off-site as required.
Collaborate with stakeholders from production to post-production process.
Monitor all technical aspects of recording and editing.
Work effectively with the team members.
desired_skills: 2-4+ years of experience as a Videographer, Video Editor, Video Specialist or similar role in the Media Industry.
A complete portfolio depicting previous work.
Solid experience of using video editing software like Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro or Davinci Resolve.
Creative thinker and excellent time management skills.
Work both on and off-site and pull off long hours if production isn't completed.
